title: Link a Monday chart/dashboard to a Google Slides presentation
excerpt:

posts.author: sellismeehan (Stephanie Ellis-Meehan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have developed some excellent charts/batteries etc to track my tasks in Monday and would like to be able to publicize some of these during internal meetings.

We use Google Slides and there are a lot of cases where I can dynamically link in a chart (in google sheets) that I can refresh the day of presentation to show latest status…any way to do this with Google/Monday via intergrations/automations etc?
